name: Almond Toffee Bars
recipeInstructions:
Combine flour and powdered sugar in a medium bowl; cut in butter until crumbly.
Press firmly into the bottom of a 9 x 13 baking pan. Bake for 15 minutes at 350°F.
Combine sweetened condensed milk, egg, and almond extract in a large bowl. Mix well.
Stir in toffee pieces and slivered almonds. Spread evenly over baked crust.
Bake for an additional 25 minutes or until golden brown. Cool before cutting into bars.
Store covered in the refrigerator.
